Class DrivePackage

java.lang.Object
com.amilesend.onedrive.resource.DriveItemType
com.amilesend.onedrive.resource.DriveItemFolderType
com.amilesend.onedrive.resource.DrivePackage
public class DrivePackage extends DriveItemFolderType
A wrapper around a DriveItem that represents a package (OneNote).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DrivePackage(DriveItem delegate)
    Creates a new DrivePackage that wraps the given getDelegate() DriveItem.

    createFolder, getChildFiles, getChildFolders, getChildPackages, getChildren, move, move, move, search, update, upload, upload, upload, upload, uploadAsync, uploadAsync, uploadAsync, uploadAsync
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DriveFolder
    createFolder(String name)
    Creates a new folder with the given name under this folder.
    List<DriveFile>
    getChildFiles()
    Gets the list of child drive files under this folder.
    List<DriveFolder>
    getChildFolders()
    Gets the list of child drive folders under this folder.
    List<DrivePackage>
    getChildPackages()
    Gets the list of child drive packages under this folder.
    List<? extends DriveItemType>
    getChildren()
    Gets the list of drive items (both folders and files) under this folder.
    DriveFolder
    move(@NonNull DriveFolder destinationFolder, String newName)
    Moves this folder to the specified DriveFolder along with the new file name.
    DriveFolder
    move(DriveFolder destinationFolder)
    Moves this folder to the specified DriveFolder.
    DriveFolder
    move(String destinationParentId, String newName)
    Moves this folder to the specified newParentId (i.e., represents a new DriveFolder's ID) along with the new folder name.
    List<? extends DriveItemType>
    search(String query)
    Searches this folder for the given query (e.g., file name).
    DriveFolder
    update()
    Updates the attributes for this folder.
    DriveFile
    upload(File file)
    Deprecated.
    use DriveItemFolderType.upload(Path) instead
    DriveFile
    upload(File file, com.amilesend.client.connection.file.TransferProgressCallback callback)
    Deprecated.
    use DriveItemFolderType.upload(Path, TransferProgressCallback) instead
    DriveFile
    upload(Path filePath)
    Uploads the given file under this folder.
    DriveFile
    upload(Path filePath, com.amilesend.client.connection.file.TransferProgressCallback callback)
    Uploads the given file under this folder and reports transfer progress to the specified TransferProgressCallback.
    DriveFileUploadExecution
    uploadAsync(File file)
    Deprecated.
    use DriveItemFolderType.uploadAsync(Path) instead
    DriveFileUploadExecution
    uploadAsync(File file, com.amilesend.client.connection.file.TransferProgressCallback callback)
    Deprecated.
    use DriveItemFolderType.uploadAsync(Path, TransferProgressCallback) instead
    DriveFileUploadExecution
    uploadAsync(Path filePath)
    Uploads the given file asynchronously under this folder.
    DriveFileUploadExecution
    uploadAsync(Path filePath, com.amilesend.client.connection.file.TransferProgressCallback callback)
    Uploads the given file asynchronously under this folder and reports transfer progress to the specified TransferProgressCallback.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Permission>
    addPermission(AddPermissionRequest request)
    Adds a permission for the given request.
    AsyncJob
    copy(@NonNull DriveFolder destinationFolder, String newName)
    Copies this drive item type to the specified DriveFolder along with the new file name.
    AsyncJob
    copy(DriveFolder destinationFolder)
    Copies this drive item type to the specified DriveFolder.
    AsyncJob
    copy(String newName)
    Copies this drive item type to the specified newName within the same folder.
    AsyncJob
    copy(String destinationParentId, String newName)
    Copies this drive item type to the specified newParentId (i.e., represents a new DriveFolder's ID) along with the new file name.

    Creates a sharing link for the given request.

    Mark this drive item type for deletion.

    getActivities()
    Gets the list of activities associated with this drive item.
    IdentitySet
    getCreatedBy()
    Gets the identity set that indicates who created this drive item.
    String
    getCreatedDateTime()
    Gets the timestamp (formatted as a string) that indicates when this drive item was created.
    String
    getETag()
    Gets the eTag associated with this item.
    FileSystemInfo
    getFileSystemInfo()
    Gets the local file system information associated with this drive item.
    String
    getId()
    Gets the drive item identifier.
    IdentitySet
    getLastModifiedBy()
    Gets the identity set that indicates who made the last modification to this drive item.
    String
    getLastModifiedDateTime()
    Gets the timestamp (formatted as a string) that indicates when this drive item was modified.
    String
    getName()
    Gets the name of this drive item.
    Package
    getPackage()
    Gets the package information associated with this drive item.
    ItemReference
    getParentReference()
    Gets the parent reference of this drive item.

    Gets the list of permissions associated with this drive item.
    RemoteItem
    getRemoteItem()
    Gets the remote item information.
    List<ThumbnailSet>

    Gets the list thumbnails associated with this drive item.
    List<DriveItemVersion>

    Gets the list of versions for this drive item.

    Describes if this drive item has been marked for deletion.
    boolean

    Describes if this is a file.

    isFolder()
    Describes if this is a folder.
    boolean
    isPackage()
    Describes if this is a package.
    boolean
    isRemote()
    Describes if this drive item represents a remote item from another drive.
